LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_168.english: There are traces here of a not-so-old camp.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_168.korean: 여기에 오래되지 않은 캠프를 했던 흔적이 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_169.english: If you follow that, you'll be able to meet other people.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_169.korean: 그걸 따라가다 보면 다른 사람들을 만날 수 있을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_17.english: have no intention of meeting people. There are still Soul Junk around here that I need to kill…
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_17.korean: 저는 사람들을 만날 생각 없어요.&n아직 이 주변에 죽여야 할 소울정크가…

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_170.english: Iron… If it’s Soul Junk, you can deal with it anytime.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_170.korean: 철… 소울정크라면 언제든지 상대할 수 있잖아.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_171.english: I'm a civilian who got lost and was wandering.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_172.english: I'm sorry, but could you share some food and water?
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_172.korean: 미안한데 식량이랑 물을 좀 나눠줄 수 있을까?

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_173.english: It's not like there's a big story behind it.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_174.english: I couldn't get into the survivor camp, so I was wandering around here and there.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_174.korean: 생존자 캠프에 들어가지 못해서 여기저기 떠돌고 있었어.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_175.english: We haven't been here long, so we don't know much.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_175.korean: 우리는 이곳에 온 지 얼마 지나지 않아서 잘 몰라.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_176.english: I fought and defeated them a few times.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_179.english: I had that thought too when I first entered virtual reality.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_179.korean: 나도 가상 현실에 처음 들어왔을 때 그런 생각을 했었어.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_18.english: Alright! I'll go on my own two feet! I'll follow quietly, so please let go of me now...!
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_18.korean: 알았어요! 제 발로 갈게요!&n조용히 따라갈 테니까 당신도 이제 그만 놔 주세요…!

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_182.english: Still, isn't the important thing the feeling right now?
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_182.korean: 그래도 중요한 건 지금의 감정이 아닐까?

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_183.english: The fact that you are thinking that way right now is cool in itself.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_183.korean: 지금 네가 그런 생각을 한다는 것 자체가 멋진 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_184.english: It means you acknowledged those feelings instead of turning them away, right? That's something to be proud of.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_184.korean: 그 감정을 외면하지 않고 인정했다는 거잖아? 자랑스러운 일이야.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_186.english: Then I'll at least give you a few simple instructions.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_186.korean: 그럼 적어도 간단한 지시 몇 개만 알려줄게.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_187.english: It will be much easier to fight.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_188.english: Is that level of strength common here?
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_188.korean: 이곳에서 저 정도 힘은 흔한 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_191.english: ...No, I met her for the first time today.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_192.english: Is that so? Maybe it's because I've experienced something similar.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_192.korean: 그런가? 비슷한 일을 경험해서 그럴지도 몰라.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_193.english: I just... couldn't leave it alone.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_193.korean: 나는 그저... 내버려둘 수 없었을 뿐이야.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_195.english: There was talk about staying together at the camp for the time being.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_195.korean: 여기 캠프에서 당분간 함께하지 않겠냐고 얘기가 나왔어.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_198.english: I'll ask you just one thing.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_199.english: Are you doing this because you don't like me?

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_2.english: I told you that, and you followed right away...

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_200.english: Then that's it. I won't worry about it.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_201.english: It's okay, that's what I hear often.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_202.english: Why don't you try living life the way your heart desires?
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_202.korean: 너도 마음 가는 대로 지내보는 건 어때?

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_203.english: Are you sure you'll be okay? If you get cut by mistake, it won't just end with getting hurt.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_203.korean: 괜찮겠어? 실수로 베이기라도 하면 다치는 걸로 끝나지 않아.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_204.english: Why don't you give it a try?

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_205.english: Think about it. The only enemies you've faced so far are weaklings.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_205.korean: 생각해 봐. 네가 지금까지 상대해온 적은 약한 놈들뿐이야.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_206.english: But someday you might meet a stronger and more dangerous enemy.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_206.korean: 하지만 언젠가는 더 강하고 위험한 적을 만나게 될지도 몰라.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_207.english: You won't be able to hold out back then with your current skills.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_21.english: You're completely different from anyone I've met before.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_23.english: - Not long after that, we found people who looked like vagrants.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_23.korean: - 그 후로 얼마 지나지 않아 우리는 유랑민으로 보이는 사람들을 찾았다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_24.english: - These are people I encountered during the previous playthrough as well.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_26.english: I understand. We can't just leave the little lambs wandering in the forest alone.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_26.korean: 알겠다 숲에서 헤메는 어린 양들을 내버려 둘 수는 없지.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_27.english: Anyone will do, bring some food and water. I will talk to these children for a moment.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_27.korean: 아무나 좋으니 한 사람, 식량과 물을 준비해 오도록.&n난 잠시 이 아이들과 얘기를 나누겠다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_28.english: Is it really okay? Even if you give food to kids you've never seen before...?
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_28.korean: 정말 괜찮을까요? 처음 보는 애들한테 식량을 주셔도…?

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_29.english: Thanks to the provisions obtained from the shopping district recently, the wagon is full. Don't worry too much.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_29.korean: 근래 상점가에서 얻은 양식 덕분에 짐마차는 가득 찼다.&n너무 걱정하지 마라.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_3.english: Did you really chase after me to pick a fight? If so...

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_30.english: Yes! I'll trust only Mr. Barbara!

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_31.english: It is only natural for those who are well-off to share.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_31.korean: 풍족한 사람이 나누는 것은 당연한 일이다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_32.english: More importantly, why were you guys wandering around in a deserted forest?
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_32.korean: 그보다 너희는 왜 인기척도 없는 숲속을 돌아다니고 있었지?

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_33.english: It is rare for only three people to travel through this 'blank' overflowing with Soul Junk.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_33.korean: 소울정크가 넘쳐나는 이 '공백' 안에서 단 세 명이 다닌다는 건 흔치 않은 일이다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_34.english: It’s hard to believe you're just ordinary wanderers.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_36.english: Surely not, you don't know about blank spaces either?

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_38.english: I see. So you guys are kids who just drifted into this place.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_38.korean: 알겠다, 너희들은 이곳에 막 흘러들어온 아이들이라는 거군.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_39.english: The Void is like a giant hole that has swallowed up a part of this world. It is a massive disaster that has sucked everything in.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_39.korean: 공백이라는 건 이 세계의 일부를 집어삼킨 거대한 구멍 같은 존재다.&n모든 것을 빨아들인 거대한 재해지.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_40.english: It may be hard to believe, but we are currently trapped in an unknown space called the 'blank'.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_40.korean: 믿기 어렵겠지만, 지금 우리는 그 '공백'이라는 미지의 공간에 갇혀 있는 상태다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_41.english: And Soul Junk refers to the monsters that exist within it.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_41.korean: 그리고 소울정크는 그 안에 존재하는 괴물들을 말한다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_42.english: So you fought and defeated them... Hmm, then that means all three of them are already supernatural ability users.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_42.korean: 싸워 물리쳤다라… 흠, 그렇다면 세 사람 다 이미 이능력자라는 말이군.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_43.english: Fine, we always welcome lost sheep. But, we'll need time to get to know each other before accepting them.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_43.korean: 좋다, 우린 언제나 길 잃은 양을 환영한다.&n하지만, 받아들이기 전에 서로를 알 시간은 필요하겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_44.english: I am just about to set out on a journey to acquire new supplies. How about we take some time to get to know each other while traveling together?
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_44.korean: 마침 곧 새로운 물자를 구하는 길에 나서려는 참이다.&n같이 가면서 서로 알아가는 시간을 가져보는 건 어떻겠나?

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_45.english: I look forward to working with you.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_46.english: … There is something I absolutely want to get revenge for.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_47.english: I will keep killing Soul Junk until I kill it.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_47.korean: 그것을 죽여버리기 전까진 소울정크를 계속 죽일 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_48.english: … She seems like a child who holds a strong grudge against Soul Junk.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_49.english: Did you lose someone precious because of the gap?

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_51.english: I see. I know exactly that feeling of wishing you were dead instead. You must have been accumulating mental illness all alone all this time.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_51.korean: 그렇군, 차라리 자기가 죽었으면 하는 그 기분 잘 알지.&n분명 지금껏 혼자 마음의 병을 쌓아왔을 거다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_52.english: There are many people at our Azland Camp who have suffered the pain of losing family members. There will be people who understand you.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_52.korean: 우리 아즈란드 캠프에도 가족을 잃은 아픔을 가진 이들이 많다.&n너를 이해해 줄 사람들도 있을 거다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_53.english: … I don't need things like understanding. I just solve things my own way.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_53.korean: …이해 같은 건 필요 없어요.&n저는 제 방식대로 해결할 뿐이에요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_54.english: Here, hatred brings negativity. You would do well to change your mindset.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_54.korean: 이곳에서 증오는 부정을 가져온다.&n생각을 바꾸는 게 좋을 거다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_56.english: Alright, for now, I will let you have your way. I will think about how to resolve the problem of your heart.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_56.korean: 좋아, 일단은 네 뜻대로 하게 해주겠다.&n난 네 마음의 문제를 어떻게 해결해야 할지 고민하겠다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_57.english: I know where there are tons of Soul Junk, so go ahead and fight to your heart's content.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_57.korean: 소울정크가 잔뜩 있는 곳도 알고 있으니 어디 마음껏 싸워봐라.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_58.english: Yes, please let me fight... I'll kill them all.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_58.korean: 네, 제가 싸우게 해 주세요…&n전부 죽여버릴게요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_59.english: Okay, I'll keep an eye on you from behind.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_6.english: I'm sorry, but I won't be of much help. I don't know much about this 'blank' either.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_6.korean: 죄송하지만, 큰 도움은 못 될 거예요.&n저도 이 '공백'에 대해 아는 게 많지 않거든요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_62.english: It’s just… it’s been a long time since I’ve seen a human form other than Master.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_62.korean: 그저… 주인님 외에 인간의 모습을 보는 건 오랜만입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_63.english: Of course, I know that it isn't actually alive.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_63.korean: 물론 진짜 살아 있는 게 아니라는 건 알고 있습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_64.english: To me, created as the captain of the Empress Hounds, humans were not that important beings, with the exception of the Empress.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_64.korean: 엠프레시스 하운드의 대장으로서 만들어진 저에게, 여제님을 제외하면 인간이란 그렇게 중요한 존재가 아니었습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_65.english: There was no need to understand their way of thinking, and age, gender, or appearance were not factors in judgment when carrying out the mission.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_65.korean: 그들의 사고방식을 이해할 필요도 없었고 나이, 성별, 외모 역시 임무를 수행함에 있어 판단할 요소가 되지 않았습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_66.english: Yes, that is exactly as you said.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_67.english: However… if I had tried to understand just a little more back then… something might have been different.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_67.korean: 하지만… 그때 조금만 더 이해하려고 했다면… 무언가 달라졌을지도 모르겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_7.english: I don't need food or sleep.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_70.english: It seems they are waiting for us over there.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_70.korean: 저쪽에서 저희를 기다리고 있는 것 같습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_72.english: - And so, Vargr returned to her usual dignified self.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_72.korean: - 그렇게 바르그의 평소의 떳떳한 모습으로 돌아왔다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_73.english: Then… I’ll go kill them all.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_75.english: It's easier to fight alone. Don't worry about it.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_75.korean: 혼자 싸우는 게 편해요. 신경 쓰지 마세요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_76.english: That is exactly right. Please wait here, Master.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_78.english: … If that’s the case, I understand.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_79.english: … What on earth are those kids? They're much stronger than I imagined.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_79.korean: …저 아이들은 대체 뭐지?&n상상한 것보다도 훨씬 강하잖아.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_80.english: The child wielding two greatswords is flawless. It is a perfect movement.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_80.korean: 두 개의 대검을 다루는 아이는 흠잡을 데가 없군.&n완벽한 움직임이다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_81.english: The other one is unskilled with her sword, but unimaginable power is contained in her clumsy movements. To slice through Soul Junk like tofu—it feels like common sense is being denied.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_81.korean: 다른 한 명은 검을 다루는 솜씨는 미숙하지만, 그 어설픈 동작에 상상 못할 힘이 실려 있다.&n소울정크를 두부 썰듯이 베어버리다니, 상식을 부정 당하는 느낌이군.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_82.english: That is not true. There are many people with supernatural abilities, but those with that level of power are rare.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_82.korean: 그렇지 않다. 이능력자라면 여럿 있지만, 저 정도의 힘을 가진 이능력자는 흔치 않지.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_83.english: In this 'Void,' the greater the desire, the stronger the power gained. That child must be that strong out of a 'desire for revenge' against the Void that killed their loved one.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_83.korean: 이 '공백'에선 욕망이 클수록 더 강한 힘을 얻는다.&n저 아이는 자신의 소중한 이를 죽인 공백에 대한 '복수심'으로 저렇게 강한 거겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_84.english: … But surely I’m not going to become a ‘Desire Walker,’ am I?

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_85.english: They are those completely consumed by the energy of desire here.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_85.korean: 이곳의 욕망 에너지에 완전히 잠식된 자들이다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_86.english: They transform into evil beings and are an evil that destroys peace, like Soul Junk.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_86.korean: 그들은 사악한 존재로 변해, 소울정크처럼 평화를 부수는 악이다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_87.english: - I recalled the last moments of the day from the previous play.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_87.korean: - 나는 이전 플레이에서 하루의 마지막 모습을 떠올렸다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_88.english: - Then… does that mean the appearance back then was a form eroded by the desire energy known as this Void Desire…?
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_88.korean: - 그렇다면… 그때의 모습은 이 공백의 데자이어라는 욕망 에너지에 침식된 모습이란 건가…

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_89.english: … I hope that malice is not directed at us.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_9.english: I'll say it again, you'd better not get involved with me.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_9.korean: 다시 말하지만, 저랑 엮이지 않는 편이 좋을 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_90.english: Have you known that child for a long time?
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_90.korean: 너는 저 아이와 오래 알고 지낸 사이인가?

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_91.english: Even so, you speak as if you’ve known me for a long time.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_91.korean: 그럼에도 마치 오래 알고 지낸 것처럼 말하는군.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_93.english: I've also developed high expectations for that child. I hope we can stay together for a while.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_93.korean: 나도 저 아이에겐 큰 기대가 생겼다.&n당분간 함께했으면 좋겠군.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_94.english: Excuse me... I just finished killing all the Soul Junk around here, so what are you talking about?
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_94.korean: 저기… 주변의 소울정크들을 다 죽이고 왔는데, 무슨 얘기 중이신가요?

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_95.english: Iron… I have dealt with all the Soul Junk.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_96.english: Whether for the time being or for the long term, I hope we can continue to be together. I hope this precious bond lasts at our Azland Camp.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_96.korean: 당분간이던, 장기간이던 앞으로 함께했으면 좋겠군.&n소중한 인연이 우리 아즈란드 캠프에서 지속되길 바란다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_97.english: - Vargr checked my gaze and nodded lightly.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_97.korean: - 바르그는 내 눈빛을 확인하더니 가볍게 고개를 끄덕였다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_98.english: I like it. Moving together would be advantageous for fighting, too.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_98.korean: 나는 좋다.&n함께 움직이는 게 싸우는 데에도 유리하겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_99.english: I don't care at all. Just let me kill everything that exists within this void.
LastCorruptedRecord1-3ED_99.korean: 전 아무래도 상관없어요.&n이 공백 안에 존재하는 모든 것들을 죽이게만 해주세요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_1.english: Well, today is a memorable day as we have gained three new comrades.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_1.korean: 자, 오늘은 새로운 동지가 세 명이나 늘어난 기념할 만한 날이다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_10.english: Everyone here hopes that you will cast off your worries and smile. Now, please accept the heart of the pig that sacrificed its life to be cooked for you.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_10.korean: 여기 있는 모두가 네가 근심을 털고 미소 짓기를 바라고 있다.&n자, 너를 위해 제 목숨을 바쳐 조리된 돼지의 마음을 받아주거라.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_100.english: Mr. Vargr… you are really strong…

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_104.english: Of course, that is important too. But someday, you will reach a time when you can reflect on yourself, just like I did.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_104.korean: 물론 그것도 중요하지.&n하지만 언젠가 너는 나처럼 자신을 돌아볼 수 있는 시기를 맞게 될 거다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_105.english: At that time, you can definitely achieve great growth.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_105.korean: 그때 분명, 너는 큰 성장을 이룰 수 있다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_106.english: Will... such a day... really... ever come...?

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_107.english: Thank you. Just hearing you say that... gives me a little more strength.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_107.korean: 감사해요.&n그런 말을 해 주시는 것만으로… 조금은 더 힘이 나는 것 같아요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_11.english: I don't really know what happened, but let's forget it all for now and have fun together!
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_11.korean: 무슨 일이 있었는지는 잘 모르지만, 지금만큼은 다 잊고 함께 즐기자고!

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_110.english: What? You clearly said that's all for today...?

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_111.english: Didn't you say you felt energized? If so, you should be able to do a little more.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_111.korean: 힘이 난다고 하지 않았나?&n그렇다면 좀 더 할 수 있겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_113.english: Hmm... I understand the situation at your camp well.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_113.korean: 흠... 너희 캠프의 사정은 잘 알았다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_114.english: … So you're saying you're inquiring about Desire Walker's whereabouts from the wandering camps visiting you?
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_114.korean: …그래서 너희들을 방문하는 유랑 캠프들을 상대로 데자이어 워커의 행적을 수소문하고 있다는 거군?

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_116.english: If Desire Walker had been left unchecked, one would have expected at least one major incident to have occurred, but it is surprisingly quiet. Did she die or something?
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_116.korean: 데자이어 워커가 방치되었다면 큰 사건이 하나라도 터졌을 법 한데 의외로 조용하군.&n그대로 죽거나 한 건 아닌가?

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_117.english: Given her personality, it is highly likely that 'Haru Estia' is still moving quietly.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_117.korean: 하루 에스티아'는 성격상 아직 조용히 움직이고 있을 가능성이 높습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_118.english: But no one knows when or where an incident will break out.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_118.korean: 하지만 언제 어디서 사건이 터질지는 아무도 모르죠.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_119.english: It is safest to find and remove it before it becomes a major disaster.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_119.korean: 큰 재앙이 되기 전에 미리 찾아내 제거하는 게 가장 안전합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_12.english: Right! No one here will bother you!
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_12.korean: 그래! 여기 있는 누구도 널 괴롭히지 않을 거야!

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_120.english: It is too difficult to track or respond to her movements with only our garrison camp, 'Grass Blanket'.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_120.korean: 주둔 캠프인 저희 '잔디이불'만으로는 그녀의 움직임을 파악하거나 대응하기가 너무 어렵습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_121.english: Understood. I will share information about Desire Walker at the upcoming meeting of the Nomad Camp representatives.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_121.korean: 알겠다, 곧 열릴 유랑 캠프 대표자 회의에서, 데자이어 워커에 대한 정보를 공유하도록 하지.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_122.english: Rumors spread quickly among wandering camps, so you'll be able to find it soon.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_122.korean: 유랑 캠프 사이에서 소문은 금세 퍼지니 금방 발견할 수 있을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_123.english: Thank you. I apologize for leaving this task to the wandering camp when it is something our garrison camp should be handling.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_123.korean: 감사합니다.&n저희 주둔 캠프가 처리해야 할 일인데 유랑 캠프에 떠맡겨서 죄송하네요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_124.english: Haha, in tough times, we survive by helping each other. If you feel really bad... I’d like you to add a little extra to today’s deal.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_124.korean: 하하, 힘든 시기엔 때는 서로 도우며 생존하는 거지.&n정 미안하면... 오늘 거래에서 약간 더 얹어줬으면 하는군.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_125.english: We will need to discuss this with Mr. Tenebris, but he will certainly consider it positively. Thank you very much for your cooperation.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_125.korean: 테네브리스 씨'와 논의는 해봐야하지만, 분명 긍정적으로 검토하실 겁니다.&n협조해주셔서 정말 감사드립니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_126.english: It’s not a bad thing for us to help where we can, and if we can get more supplies, that’s fine.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_126.korean: 우리야 도울 수 있는 일을 돕고, 물자를 더 얻어 갈 수 있다면 나쁜 게 아니지.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_128.english: Hmm? You look like you're in a good mood.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_129.english: Of course. You have no idea how much I lost sleep after missing that.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_129.korean: 물론이죠, 그걸 놓친 뒤 얼마나 밤잠을 설쳤는지 모릅니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_130.english: I put so much effort into making 'that,' so I can't just let this 'masterpiece' slip away like this.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_130.korean: 제가 '그걸' 만드느라 얼마나 고생을 했는데&n힘들게 만든 '걸작'을 이렇게 놓칠 수야 없죠.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_131.english: I don't know what you're talking about, but... even if we figure out the location, can we actually go and catch them? They're Desire Walkers, after all.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_131.korean: 무슨 소리인지 모르겠지만... 위치가 파악된다고 한들 가서 잡을 수나 있는 건가?&n상대는 데자이어 워커잖아.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_132.english: Don't worry. Once the location is identified, I will step in and handle it myself.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_132.korean: 걱정 마세요.&n위치만 파악된다면 제가 직접 나서서 처리할 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_133.english: I have my own thoughts on everything.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_134.english: Really? Well, our camp doesn't want to get deeply involved in dangerous matters, so just handle it yourselves.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_134.korean: 그래? &n뭐, 우리 캠프는 위험한 일에 깊게 관여하긴 싫으니 알아서 잘 해보라고.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_135.english: Yes, I am well aware of it.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_136.english: I am really looking forward to seeing it completed.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_136.korean: 그게 완성되는 모습을 보는 게 참으로 기대가 됩니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_137.english: It’s okay to try even just a little bit; it’s really delicious.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_137.korean: 조금이라도 괜찮으니 먹어 봐, 정말 맛있어.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_138.english: Vargr is eating over there, too, isn't she?

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_141.english: You're not saying you want to be alone this time?

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_142.english: Right. Did you kind of feel like doing that?

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_144.english: Doesn't that mean you weren't such a negative person?
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_144.korean: 그건 네가 그렇게 부정적인 사람은 아니었다는 거 아닐까?

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_145.english: You've changed this much with just a brief connection, haven't you?

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_146.english: That means you were in better shape than expected.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_146.korean: 그렇다는 건, 너는 생각보다 괜찮은 상태였단 뜻이야.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_148.english: I think a smile would suit you well.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_148.korean: 역시 넌, 미소가 잘 어울릴 것 같아.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_149.english: Can you give me a nice smile just once?
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_149.korean: 한 번 기분 좋게 웃어줄 수 있어?

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_15.english: Aren't you going to eat? Then I'll eat it!
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_15.korean: 안 먹을 거야? 그럼 내가 먹는다~!

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_150.english: That's enough. All I want is your smile.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_150.korean: 충분해. 내가 바라는 건 너의 미소밖에 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_151.english: It looks like you're forcing a smile. It feels fake.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_151.korean: 억지로 웃는 것 같네. 가식적인 느낌이야.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_152.english: You mean I don't feel like laughing because I still have vengeance...?
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_152.korean: 복수가 남아 있어서 웃을 기분이 안든다… 그 말이지?

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_153.english: Okay. I can't force you to laugh when you're not in the mood.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_153.korean: 알았어. 웃을 기분이 아닌데 억지로 웃으라 강요할 순 없지.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_154.english: But you know what? Thinking only about revenge isn't going to solve everything, is it?
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_154.korean: 하지만 말이야. 그렇게 복수만 생각한다고 전부 해결되는 건 아니잖아?

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_155.english: Killing isn't the only form of revenge.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_156.english: The day will come when you find out.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_156.korean: 곧 알게 되는 날이 올 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_157.english: It's okay. We'll help you somehow, so you'll change little by little.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_157.korean: 괜찮아. 어떻게든 우리가 도울 테니까, 너도 조금씩 변해갈 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_16.english: Hey, what are you doing! That's the meat I was planning to eat!
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_16.korean: 앗, 뭐하는 짓이냐! 그건 내가 먹으려고 했던 고기다!

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_17.english: Hehe~ First come, first served~ Yum~!
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_17.korean: 헤헷~ 먼저 집은 사람이 임자지~ 냠~!

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_19.english: Why are you fighting over something like that! There's plenty of meat!
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_19.korean: 뭘 그런걸로 싸우고 그래! 고기는 많이 있잖아!

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_2.english: With the help of heaven and plenty of food, eat and drink today without any worries.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_2.korean: 하늘도 도와 식량도 풍부하니, 오늘 하루는 아무 걱정 없이 먹고 마시거라.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_21.english: Hmm, thanks. And I'm not a puppy...
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_21.korean: 음, 고맙다. 그리고 나는 강아지가 아니다…

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_23.english: Ah, it's hot... but it's delicious.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_24.english: Here! Try this skewer, my masterpiece!
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_24.korean: 자! 여기 내 자신작인 이 꼬치도 먹어보라고!

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_25.english: Her expression hasn't changed at all, but I'm glad to hear it tastes good!
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_25.korean: 표정은 전혀 변한 게 없지만, 그래도 맛있다니 다행이네!

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_26.english: Um... I can't eat it all, so please give me just a little...
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_26.korean: 저기… 다 못 먹으니까 조금만 주세요…

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_27.english: - Just as the festivities were in full swing, I made an excuse to go out to a place a little distance from the campsite to help with digestion.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_27.korean: - 한창 잔치가 무르익을 무렵, 나는 소화시킬겸 핑계를 대고 캠프장에서 좀 떨어진 곳으로 나왔다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_33.english: The Commander told me to 'live life as my heart desires,' didn't he?
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_33.korean: 사령관님은 저에게 '마음 가는 대로 지내보라'고 하셨죠?

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_35.english: But after coming here and meeting people... I talked a lot. I really talked a lot.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_35.korean: 하지만 이곳에 와서 사람들을 만나고… 많이 대화했어요.&n정말 많이 얘기했어요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_36.english: Knowing that I detested everything about the blank space, they said they would support and help me. They also empathized with the pain of losing my mother and comforted me.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_36.korean: 제가 공백의 모든 것을 혐오하는 걸 알고, 절 응원하고 도와준다고 했어요.&n엄마를 잃은 아픔도 공감해주고, 위로해주었어요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_37.english: Of course, my goal is still to eliminate the gap. But... I felt like I don't need to rush that right now.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_37.korean: 물론 제 목표는 여전히 공백을 없애는 거예요.&n그치만... 지금 당장 그렇게 서두르지 않아도 될 것 같다는 생각이 들었어요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_38.english: Meeting people... I feel like I've gained a little more composure.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_38.korean: 사람들과 만나면서... 조금은 여유가 생긴 것 같아요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_39.english: And I really want to thank Mr. Vargr and the Commander.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_39.korean: 그리고 바르그 씨랑 사령관님께… 정말 감사드리고 싶어요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_4.english: I'll enjoy the meal, Mr. Baber!

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_40.english: Before I met the two of you, I was trapped in a negative mindset.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_40.korean: 저는 두 분을 만나기 전까진, 부정적인 사고에 갇혀 있었어요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_41.english: The only thought that came to mind was that I had to take revenge on the void that took everything from me.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_41.korean: 제 모든 걸 앗아간 공백에 복수해야 한다는 생각 밖에 떠오르는 게 없었죠.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_42.english: In this massive void… I became impatient to get revenge somehow, so I just blindly thought I had to become strong.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_42.korean: 이 거대한 공백에… 어떻게든 복수하기 위해 조급해져서 무작정 강해져야 한다고만 생각했어요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_43.english: I couldn't find my bearings, and I just thought I had to become stronger.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_43.korean: 갈피도 잡지 못하고, 그저 강해져야만 한다고 생각했죠.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_44.english: However, as I met the Commander and Mr. Vargr and talked with the people here, that thought gradually changed.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_44.korean: 그런데 사령관님과 바르그 씨를 만나고 이곳 사람들과 함께 얘기하면서 그 생각이 조금씩 바뀌었어요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_45.english: Rather than always steadily killing Soul Junk and trying to take revenge little by little…
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_45.korean: 언제나 착실하게 소울정크들을 죽이고 조금씩 복수하려 드는 것보단…

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_46.english: Sometimes, I think it’s not so bad to learn from someone and hang out with them like this.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_46.korean: 가끔은 이렇게 누군가에게 배우고, 어울리는 것도 나쁘지 않구나… 하고요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_47.english: Isn't it fascinating? Actually, we haven't known each other for very long... It's amazing how much we can change from just a brief encounter.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_47.korean: 신기하죠? 사실 만난 지 얼마 되지도 않았는데… 잠깐의 인연으로도 이렇게까지 달라질 수 있다는 게요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_49.english: ...That's true... I really might be the case.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_5.english: - As dusk fell, Barbara invited us to the camp and hosted a small feast to welcome us.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_5.korean: - 날이 저물자 바버르는 우리를 캠프로 초대해, 환영의 의미로 작은 잔치를 열어주었다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_50.english: Still, I want to thank the two of you for changing me like this.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_50.korean: 그래도 저를 이렇게 변화시켜준 두 분께 감사하고 싶어요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_51.english: Is there anything you would like? I’ll do anything I can for you.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_51.korean: 혹시… 원하시는 게 있으세요?&n제가 할 수 있는 일이라면 뭐든지 해드릴게요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_52.english: What's wrong? Why are you looking at me like that...

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_53.english: What? You want me to smile... Is that all you're okay with? Don't you want anything else?
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_53.korean: 네? 웃어보라니…&n그걸로 괜찮으세요? 다른 건 원하지 않으세요?

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_54.english: Oh, um... even if you say that so suddenly... it's awkward to laugh so suddenly...
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_54.korean: 앗, 저기… 갑자기 그렇게 말씀하셔도… 갑자기 웃는 건 곤란하네요…

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_55.english: Hahaha… Is, is this how I'm supposed to laugh?

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_56.english: This is the only smile I can show you right now…
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_56.korean: 지금 제가 보여드릴 수 있는 웃음은 이런 것 밖에 없어요…

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_57.english: Because there is still work to be done... and because I haven't found a way to get revenge...
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_57.korean: 아직 해야 할 일이 남아 있으니까…&n복수할 방법을 찾지 못했으니까요…

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_58.english: Although I feel a little more at ease socializing with people, I still can't laugh freely.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_58.korean: 사람들과 어울리며 마음이 조금 편해지긴 했지만,&n아직은 마음 놓고 웃을 수 없어요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_62.english: ...I don't really understand what you mean…

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_65.english: Okay. That's all for today's training.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_66.english: Haa... Haa... Yes, thank you for your hard work...

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_67.english: By now, at the very least, you must have definitely mastered how to grip and swing a sword. Considering the strength you possess... you must have become at least three times stronger.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_67.korean: 이제 최소한, 검을 어떻게 쥐고 휘둘러야 하는지는 확실히 익혔겠지.&n네가 가진 힘을 고려하면... 적어도 세 배는 강해졌을 거다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_68.english: The sword definitely feels much lighter than before.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_68.korean: 확실히 예전보다 검이 훨씬 가볍게 느껴져요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_69.english: A tree without a trunk is bound to fall eventually. The same goes for swordsmanship. The lower body must properly maintain balance to perform its role effectively.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_69.korean: 밑동 없는 나무는 결국 쓰러지기 마련이다.&n검도 마찬가지지.&n하체가 중심을 제대로 잡아줘야 제 역할을 한다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_7.english: Is something bothering you? You'd better just enjoy yourself for now.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_7.korean: 뭔가 고민이라도 있나? 지금만큼은 그냥 즐기는 게 좋을 거다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_70.english: That is… of course partly thanks to technology, but for me… I think there is another reason as well.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_70.korean: 그건… 물론 기술 덕분이기도 하지만요.&n저에겐… 다른 이유도 있는 것 같아요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_72.english: Ever since I entered this 'blank'... only my dead mother's face kept coming to mind... No matter what I did or what I ate, I kept thinking of my mother, so I couldn't feel any emotion.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_72.korean: 이 '공백'에 들어온 이후로... 계속 죽은 엄마의 얼굴만 떠올랐어요…&n뭘 해도, 뭘 먹어도 계속 엄마 생각만 나서, 아무 감정도 느껴지지 않았어요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_74.english: However, training here with Mr. Vargr, and talking with the Commander and the camp people... I think I've gained a little more composure.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_74.korean: 하지만 여기서 바르그 씨와 함께 훈련하고, 사령관님 그리고 캠프 사람들과 함께 이야기하면서...&n조금 여유가 생긴 것 같아요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_75.english: I didn't feel rushed like before, the food tasted good... and for the first time in a long while, I was able to sleep comfortably.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_75.korean: 예전처럼 마음 급해지지도 않고, 식사도 맛있게 느껴지고…&n잠도 오랜만에 편하게 잘 수 있었어요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_76.english: … Is that so… If so, that is a real relief.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_77.english: Ah... haha... it might not be a huge change, though.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_77.korean: 아… 하하… 대단한 변화는 아닐지도 모르겠지만요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_79.english: Mr. Vargr… Mr. Vargr… did you also… lose a precious family member?
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_79.korean: 바르그 씨는…&n바르그 씨도… 소중한 가족을 잃으셨나요?

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_8.english: I… I don’t need to eat. Please have the others.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_8.korean: 저는… 안 먹어도 괜찮아요. 다른 분들이 드세요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_81.english: Mr. Vargr, you looked sad whenever I talked about my family. If not, I'm sorry... I might have misunderstood.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_81.korean: 제가 가족 이야기를 할 때마다 바르그 씨는 슬퍼 보이셨어요.&n아니라면 죄송해요… 제가 괜히 오해한 걸지도 몰라요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_82.english: Did I make that kind of face?

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_83.english: At least, that's how it seemed to me.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_84.english: ...If you felt that way, then maybe that is the case.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_85.english: You're absolutely right; I lost my precious family. And I acted for only one purpose.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_85.korean: 확실히 네 말대로 나는 소중한 가족을 잃었다.&n그리고 단 하나의 목적만을 위해 움직였지.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_86.english: If you think about it that way... it might be similar to you.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_87.english: How did you... shake off that pain?

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_9.english: You don't need to worry about food. Our Azland Camp is very well-stocked these days, so this level of luxury is just for fun.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_9.korean: 식량 걱정이라면 안 해도 된다.&n우리 아즈란드 캠프는 요즘 아주 풍족하니, 이 정도 사치는 여흥일 뿐이다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_90.english: If I had completely overcome it, I wouldn't be showing you that expression right now.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_90.korean: 만약 완전히 이겨냈다면,&n지금 너에게 그런 표정을 보이지도 않았겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_92.english: "Break free from delusion and live your own life."

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_93.english: But I… in the end, I couldn’t completely shake it off, even until the very end.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_93.korean: 하지만 나는…&n결국 마지막까지도 완전히 떨쳐낼 수 없었다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_95.english: It is because I thought I shouldn't shake it off.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_96.english: No matter how sad it is, that pain is mine. I must not abandon it or pass it on to others.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_96.korean: 아무리 슬프더라도 그 아픔은 나의 것이다.&n버려서도 남에게 떠맡겨서도 안된다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_97.english: I thought that shaking off that pain... meant forgetting, and forgetting meant becoming someone I was no longer.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_97.korean: 그 아픔을 떨쳐낸 다는 건…&n잊는다는 것이고&n잊는다는 건 나 자신이 아니게 된다는 것이라 생각했다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_98.english: So I decided to accept it.

LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_99.english: That this pain is a natural emotion I must cherish.
LastCorruptedRecord1-4ED_99.korean: 이 아픔은 내가 간직해야 할 당연한 감정이라고.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_1.english: Gang... Hagun... It is my defeat...

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_10.english: As expected, Desire Walker is... just a disaster.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_10.korean: 역시 데자이어 워커는... 그저 재앙일 뿐이다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_11.english: For Desire Walker, faith does not exist.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_14.english: Whatever happens... it's too late now. You can't put spilled water back in the cup.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_14.korean: 뭐가 됐든… 이젠 늦었다.&n엎질러진 물은 다시 담을 수 없다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_16.english: It might actually have been you who was disturbing my peace.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_16.korean: 나의 평화를 어지럽히는 건 오히려 네 녀석이었을지도 모르겠군.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_17.english: - Leaving Barbara behind, I hurried toward where Haru was.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_17.korean: - 나는 바버르를 뒤로한 채, 하루가 있는 곳으로 서둘러 향했다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_18.english: - If it's the same as back then... Haru will be over there.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_18.korean: - 그때랑 같다면... 저쪽에 하루가 있을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_19.english: - In that moment, a previous nightmare flashes by.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_2.english: Have they just not shown their true skills until now...?
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_2.korean: 지금까지 진짜 실력을 보여주지 않았던 건가…?

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_20.english: - The smell of burning blood and flesh…

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_22.english: - At the center of the horrific scene stood a girl.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_22.korean: - 참혹한 광경의 중심엔, 한 명의 소녀가 서 있었다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_24.english: - Because I believe in Haru, and I believe in Vargr as well.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_24.korean: - 나는 하루를 믿고 있고, 바르그 역시 믿고 있으니까.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_25.english: Commander... Commander... I... I finally know...!

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_26.english: I understand why I felt bad... and what I was mistaken about... everything!
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_26.korean: 왜 기분이 나빴는지… 무엇을 착각하고 있었는지… 모두 이해 했어요!

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_27.english: At first, I just wanted to take revenge on the Blank who killed my mother.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_27.korean: 처음에는 그저 엄마를 죽인 공백에게 복수하고 싶은 마음 뿐이었어요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_28.english: All I could think of was fighting and killing Soul Junk...
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_28.korean: 계속 소울정크와 싸우고, 죽이는 것밖에 떠오르지 않았고…

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_29.english: No matter how many times I kill... my chest feels heavy, and I just feel worse.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_29.korean: 죽여도 죽여도… 가슴이 답답하고, 기분만 더 나빠졌어요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_3.english: It felt as if it could see right through every one of my movements.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_3.korean: 마치 내 움직임을 전부 꿰뚫고 있는 것 같았다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_30.english: That is… because it wasn't what I really wanted.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_30.korean: 그건… 제가 진짜로 원했던 게 아니었기 때문이에요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_31.english: After coming here… meeting many people, talking with Mr. Vargr… I came to know.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_31.korean: 이곳에 와서… 많은 사람들을 만나고, 바르그 씨와 대화하고… 알게 됐어요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_32.english: I am not the only one who has the pain of losing someone precious.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_32.korean: 소중한 사람을 잃은 아픔을 가진 사람이 저 뿐만이 아니란 걸.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_33.english: I can't act like the only tragic protagonist anymore.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_33.korean: 이젠 저 혼자만 비극의 주인공처럼 굴 순 없어요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_34.english: I shouldn't act pitiful and expect sympathy all by myself.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_34.korean: 나 혼자 불쌍한 척하면서 동정을 바라서도 안 돼요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_35.english: Then… I wouldn’t be able to do the work of ‘helping people’ that I’ve been dreaming of.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_35.korean: 그러면…&n제가 꿈꾸던,&n‘사람들을 돕는 일’을 할 수 없게 되니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_37.english: want to be with the Commander… and everyone!

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_39.english: - I wanted to see that smile again.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_4.english: - … Well, since it’s actually the second fight…

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_40.english: - The current smile suits Haru much better.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_40.korean: - 지금의 미소가 훨씬 더 하루에게 잘 어울린다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_41.english: - The campers around us were looking at us with expressions mixed with apology and bitterness.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_41.korean: - 주변에 캠프 사람들은 미안함과 씁쓸함이 섞인 표정으로 우리를 바라보고 있었다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_42.english: - It looks like Vargr sorted it out well.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_44.english: I simply protected her so that people wouldn't harm her, just as my master instructed.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_44.korean: 그저 주인님이 말씀하신 대로, 사람들이 그녀를 해치지 않도록 지켜낸 것뿐입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_45.english: What persuaded me was solely… that child’s 'strength'.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_46.english: I think she has definitely grown enough to accept her anger and still be able to smile again.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_46.korean: 분명 자신의 분노를 받아들이고도 다시 웃을 수 있을 만큼 성장한 거라 생각합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_47.english: Oh, no. I merely did what I had to do for my master.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_47.korean: 아, 아닙니다. 저는 주인님을 위해 할 일을 했을 뿐입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_48.english: ...I didn't do this specifically hoping for a prize.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_5.english: - I almost lost in the first play.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_5.korean: - 첫 번째 플레이에서는 거의 질 뻔 했다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_50.english: - The 'peace' that Barbara spoke of is, in the end, peace for oneself alone.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_50.korean: - 바버르가 말하던 ‘평화’는 결국, 자기 자신만을 위한 평화다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_51.english: - That is neither peace nor anything else, but merely a reality of inaction and irresponsibility.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_51.korean: - 그건 평화도 뭣도 아닌 방관하고 무책임한 현실일 뿐이다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_52.english: - Isn't true peace something like this, where no one is abandoned... and everyone can smile?
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_52.korean: - 진정한 평화란 버려지는 이가 없는… 모두가 웃을 수 있는 이런 게 아닐까?

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_55.english: Player: Commander Character: Haru Estia Ending Branch: Achieved.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_55.korean: 플레이어 : 사령관&n인물 : 하루 에스티아&n엔딩 분기 : 달성 완료.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_59.english: Permission to view the following records.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_6.english: I must have already said this. I am prepared to do anything for my peace.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_6.korean: 이미 말했을 거다.&n나는 나의 평화를 위해서라면 무엇이라도 할 각오가 되어 있다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_62.english: <Haru Estia: The Wandering Sword of Vengeance> END.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_63.english: We don't really need to show our full power, do we?
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_63.korean: 굳이 이쪽의 전력을 전부 보여줄 필요는 없잖아?

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_64.english: Are you still planning to kill the day?

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_65.english: Can't you... believe me a little?

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_68.english: It means you should trust the day.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_69.english: You said it was a wandering little lamb?

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_7.english: But… it won’t be of any use now…

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_70.english: In that case, I should show them the way so they don't get lost.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_73.english: It was possible because Vargr was there.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_74.english: Because I actually couldn't have done it when I was alone.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_74.korean: 실제로 나 혼자였을 땐 해낼 수 없었으니까.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_76.english: You've worked hard, so I should give you a reward.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_8.english: The lambs in the camp were instructed to kill the evil thing when it let its guard down.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_8.korean: 캠프의 어린 양들에게는 그 사악한 것이 방심하고 있을 때 죽이라고 지시해 두었다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5ED_9.english: They either succeeded... or were annihilated by a counterattack.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_1.english: - As we stepped out of the tent, Barbara was waiting for us with an unusual expression on her face.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_1.korean: - 텐트 밖으로 나오자, 바버르는 평소와 다른 얼굴로 우리를 기다리고 있었다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_10.english: So that's essentially the case, so don't pry any further.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_10.korean: 그런 셈이니 더 이상 캐묻지 마.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_100.english: If something seems suspicious, don't hesitate to run away.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_101.english: I hope it's okay, but no matter how I look at it, the atmosphere seems ominous...
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_101.korean: 괜찮으면 좋겠지만, 아무리 봐도 분위기가 심상치 않아…

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_102.english: It looks like this is going to be an unusual interview...
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_102.korean: 아무래도 심상치 않은 면담이 될 것 같은데…

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_103.english: … What are you trying to say?

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_104.english: Calling me evil… After spending all this time together, isn’t saying that too much?
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_104.korean: 사악한 것이라니… 지금껏 같이 지내놓고, 그런 말은 너무한 거 아니야?

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_105.english: Is it really necessary to change your attitude that much the moment you find out she is a Desire Worker?
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_105.korean: 데자이어 워커라는걸 알자마자 그렇게까지 태도를 바꿀 일이야?

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_106.english: Just because you're a Desire Walker doesn't mean you have to betray them right away!
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_106.korean: 데자이어 워커라고 해서 곧바로 배신할 필요는 없잖아!

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_107.english: You saw it clearly, too! You saw what kind of kid Haru is!
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_107.korean: 너도 잘 봤잖아! 하루라는 애가 어떤 아이인지를!

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_108.english: I thought he was a good person, but I was wrong.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_11.english: Ah, hello... Is something wrong today? Everyone looks busy.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_11.korean: 아, 안녕하세요... 오늘은 무슨 일 있나요? 모두 바빠 보이시네요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_13.english: No, I stayed up all night yesterday practicing swordsmanship. My skills have improved a lot, so I'll show you, Mr. Baber, too!
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_13.korean: 아뇨, 어제는 검술 연습으로 밤을 새워버렸어요.&n실력이 많이 늘었으니까 바버르 씨에게도 보여드릴게요!

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_14.english: No, it looks like today will be a busy day, so show it to me next time. We are planning a large-scale reconnaissance mission, so you get ready quickly as well.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_14.korean: 아니, 오늘은 바쁜 하루가 될 것 같으니 다음에 보여다오.&n대규모 정찰에 나설 예정이니, 너도 빨리 준비하거라.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_15.english: Yes… if you are busy, there’s nothing I can do.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_16.english: We need to start preparing to move, so there is no time to waste any more than this.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_16.korean: 이동 준비를 시작해야 하니 이 이상은 낭비할 시간 없다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_18.english: Okay... Then I'll go get ready too.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_21.english: Judging by the fact that they aren't telling us, it doesn't seem like good news.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_21.korean: 저희에게 말하지 않는 걸 보면 좋은 얘기는 아닐 것 같습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_22.english: Master, don't you already know something?
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_22.korean: 주인님께선 이미 뭔가 알고 계신 게 아닙니까?

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_23.english: - It was a morning with a similar atmosphere in the first play as well.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_23.korean: - 첫 번째 플레이에서도 비슷한 분위기의 아침이었다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_24.english: - The people in the camp who realized that Haru was a Desire Walker tried to eliminate her, and…
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_24.korean: - 하루가 데자이어 워커라는 사실을 눈치챈 캠프 사람들은 그녀를 제거하려 했고…

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_25.english: - Shocked by that, Haru eventually came to hate everything and massacred the people of the camp.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_25.korean: - 그 충격에 하루는 결국, 모든 것을 증오하며 캠프 사람들을 학살해버렸다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_26.english: - I thought it would be different this time since Haru's condition has improved significantly compared to back then and she has grown closer to people...
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_26.korean: - 이번에는 그때와 달리 하루의 상태도 훨씬 나아졌고, 사람들과도 가까워졌으니 다를 줄 알았는데…

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_27.english: - No way, is this an unavoidable forced event?
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_27.korean: - 설마, 피할 수 없는 강제 이벤트인 건가?

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_28.english: - Still, this time is different. At least right now, I'm not alone.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_28.korean: - 그래도 이번엔 다르다.&n적어도 지금은 나 혼자가 아니니까.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_3.english: … Hmm, yes. It’s a silly morning for both of them.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_30.english: - This time, I absolutely cannot… end it with a bad ending again.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_30.korean: - 이번엔 절대로… 다시 베드 엔딩으로 끝낼 순 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_31.english: Excuse me, Commander... did we perhaps... do something rude to Mr. Barbara?
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_31.korean: 저기 사령관님…&n저희가 혹시... 바버르 씨에게 실례되는 행동이라도 한 걸까요?

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_32.english: Mr. Barbara, you seem a bit different than usual.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_32.korean: 바버르 씨, 평소와는 뭔가 다른 것 같아요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_33.english: Is that so... I hope it's nothing.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_34.english: By the way, will Ms. Vargr be okay? Even if I leave her alone at the camp...
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_34.korean: 그나저나 바르그 씨는 괜찮을까요?&n캠프에 혼자 남겨두고 와도...

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_35.english: You seemed fine just this morning, so to think your condition suddenly deteriorated…
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_35.korean: 아침까지만 해도 괜찮아 보이셨는데 갑자기 몸 상태가 안좋아지시다니…

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_38.english: - Just in case, should I tell Haru for now?
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_38.korean: - 혹시 모르니까 하루에게도 일단 말은 해둘까.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_4.english: … Is something wrong? You look unusually down today.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_40.english: I'm sorry. I... want to believe. That the people here are really good people.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_40.korean: 죄송해요.&n저는... 믿고 싶어요. 여기 있는 사람들이 정말 괜찮은 사람들이라는 걸.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_41.english: I don't want to doubt the people here.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_42.english: I had forgotten for a while while surviving the void, but…

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_43.english: I originally wanted to do work that saves people.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_43.korean: 저는 원래 사람들을 구하는 일을 하고 싶었어요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_44.english: After learning swordsmanship from Mr. Vargr and becoming stronger…
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_44.korean: 바르그 씨에게 검술을 배우고, 좀 더 강해져서…

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_45.english: I want to protect people from the void... and eliminate the void together.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_45.korean: 사람들을 공백으로부터 지키고… 함께 공백을 없애고 싶어요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_46.english: So… it will definitely be okay… definitely…

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_47.english: - So, under the pretext of a large-scale reconnaissance mission, we moved to an area far from the camp.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_47.korean: - 그렇게 우리는 대규모 정찰이라는 명목으로 캠프에서 멀리 떨어진 지역으로 이동했다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_48.english: - Even the campers, who are usually so loud, are keeping their mouths shut. As expected… the atmosphere is ominous.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_48.korean: - 평소라면 시끄럽게 떠들던 캠프 사람들도 입을 다물고 있어.&n역시… 분위기가 심상치 않아.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_49.english: I have something to tell you for a moment.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_5.english: I just had an important matter to attend to overnight, so I couldn't sleep well; you don't need to worry about it. Go have a meal.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_5.korean: 밤 사이 큰 용무가 있어 잠을 설쳤을 뿐이니 신경 쓰지 않아도 된다.&n가서 식사나 해라.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_51.english: Now, little lambs of the Azland Camp. I will have a brief conversation with you, so you go ahead.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_51.korean: 자, 아즈란드 캠프의 어린 양들아.&n나는 잠시 면담을 나눌 테니, 너희는 먼저 앞서가라.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_53.english: Ah… are we going first? Ah, please wait for us!
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_53.korean: 아… 저희 먼저 가는 건가요? 아, 기다려주세요!

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_56.english: I believe you are still wandering. That is why I want to extend a hand of salvation.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_56.korean: 나는 네가 아직 방황하고 있다고 생각한다.&n그래서 구원의 손을 내밀고자 한다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_58.english: Now, let's get rid of the evil together.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_58.korean: 자, 우리와 함께 사악한 것을 없애자.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_59.english: - So, did Haru figure out that she is a 'Desire Worker'?
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_59.korean: - 역시 하루가 '데자이어 워커'라는 걸 알아챈 건가.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_6.english: If there is a problem, I'd be willing to consult.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_60.english: Can I take that as… meaning you have no intention of being with us?
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_60.korean: 그 말은… 우리와 함께할 의지가 없다는 뜻으로 받아들여도 되는 건가?

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_61.english: Don't make me laugh! If I had known you were a Desire Walker, I wouldn't have accepted you!
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_61.korean: 웃기지 마! 데자이어 워커라는 걸 알았다면 받아들이지도 않았어!

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_62.english: Why were you hiding the fact that you were a Desire Walker? After all, weren't you in league with that evil thing to kill us all?
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_62.korean: 왜 데자이어 워커라는 것을 숨기고 있었지?&n결국 네놈도 그 사악한 것과 한패로 우리들을 모두 죽이려고 했던 것 아닌가?

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_63.english: Do not underestimate Azland Camp! This is a paradise of peace that I have built! If there is a Desire, the past will be left as mistakes, and memories as ugly!
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_63.korean: 아즈란드 캠프를 우습게 보지 마라! 이곳은 내가 일구어낸 평화의 낙원이다!&n데자이어 같은 게 있으면 과거는 과오로, 추억은 추악하게 남기게 될 것이다!

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_64.english: I sacrifice myself to protect the peace of the camp… I advance to protect the peace of the camp…
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_64.korean: 나는 캠프의 평화를 지키기 위해서 희생한다…&n나는 캠프의 평화를 지키기 위해서 나아간다…

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_65.english: If anyone disturbs my peace… I will kill them, even if it’s my own family, and trample their corpses!
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_65.korean: 나의 평화를 방해하겠다면… 설령 가족이라도 죽여 그 시체를 밟을 거다!

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_66.english: You have brought a disaster upon us that could explode at any moment. You are a sinner for whom it would not be surprising to have your head cut off.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_66.korean: 넌 우리에게 언제 터질지 모를 재앙을 들여온 거다.&n가히 목을 쳐도 이상할 게 없는 죄인이지.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_68.english: For the peace of my paradise… I will kill you right here and now!
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_68.korean: 나의 낙원의 평화를 위해… 지금 이 자리에서 널 죽이겠다!

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_69.english: - So, in the end, I can't avoid a fight this time either…
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_69.korean: - 결국 이번에도 싸움을 피할 수는 없는 건가…

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_7.english: I am the one responsible for the peace of the Azland Camp. It is irresponsible to blab about matters that I should be worrying about so carelessly.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_7.korean: 나는 아즈란드 캠프의 평화를 책임지고 있는 사람이다.&n내가 고민해야 할 일을 그렇게 멋대로 떠벌리는 것은 무책임한 일이지.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_71.english: Excuse me… Mr. Barbara, what meeting are you planning to have with the Commander?
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_71.korean: 저기… 바버르 씨는 사령관님과 무슨 면담을 하려는 거예요?

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_74.english: How far do you plan to extend this large-scale reconnaissance?
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_74.korean: 이번 대규모 정찰은 어디까지 할 계획인가요?

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_77.english: … Why aren't you saying anything? If something is wrong, please at least tell me…
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_77.korean: …왜 아무 말씀도 안 하세요.&n무슨 일 있으신 거면, 말씀이라도 해주세요…

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_80.english: I'll go back to where the Commander is.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_82.english: Ow, that hurts. Please... let go of my hand! Why on earth are you doing this?
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_82.korean: 읏, 아파요. 이 손... 놔주세요!&n대체 왜 이러시는 거에요?

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_86.english: But… it’s all for the sake of peace…

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_89.english: Scouting the surroundings? Are you planning to move your base?

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_9.english: Anyway, there is no need to worry. We are all planning to go scouting the area together today, so make sure you eat a hearty breakfast.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_9.korean: 아무튼 신경 쓸 필요 없다.&n오늘은 모두 함께 주변 정찰에 나설 예정이니, 아침을 많이 먹어 둬라.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_90.english: You look quite flustered... Are you really okay?
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_90.korean: 상당히 다급해 보이는데... 정말 괜찮은 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_92.english: … It’s a similar situation to back then.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_93.english: You know, the beginning where Haru went wild and eventually ended up with a bad ending.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_93.korean: 하루가 폭주하고 결국은 베드 엔딩을 보게 됐던 처음과 말이지.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_96.english: Well, I can't really pinpoint anything.

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_97.korean: 아마… 다른 고민이 있는 게 아닐까?

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_98.english: Huh? What are you talking about?

LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_99.english: Haru, something is off about this large-scale reconnaissance.
LastCorruptedRecord1-5OP_99.korean: 하루, 이 대규모 정찰 뭔가 이상해.

LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_1.english: Now, it's the Demon King's turn.

LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_10.english: - 1 or 0. Existing or not. Male or female. Breasts or buttocks.
LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_10.korean: - 1이냐 0이냐. 있느냐 없느냐. 남자냐 여자냐. 가슴이냐 엉덩이냐.

LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_11.english: - Between the chest and the hips, I have to choose the chest.
LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_11.korean: - 가슴과 엉덩이 중에서는 역시 가슴을 뽑아야 돼.

LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_12.english: - No, but it would be a waste to give up the butt. Still, choosing the butt over the breasts...
LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_12.korean: - 아니 그래도 엉덩이를 버리기는 아깝지. 그렇다고 가슴을 포기하고 엉덩이를 선택하는 건…

LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_13.english: At this rate, it'll be dawn... Pull it out quickly.

LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_14.english: - Ugh, as expected, both of them...! No, the right one!
LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_14.korean: - 큭, 역시 둘 다...! 아니, 오른쪽!

LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_15.english: - I picked up the right card that Ireina held out.
LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_15.korean: - 나는 이레이나가 내민 오른쪽 카드를 집었다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_16.english: - And when I checked the card, the number written on it was 2.

LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_17.english: - This number… is the same as my last card. In that case…
LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_17.korean: - 이 숫자는… 내 마지막 카드와 같다.&n그렇다면…

LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_18.english: Next up is Ireina's turn... Ah! I got it right. Ireina's done, too.
LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_18.korean: 다음은 이레이나 차례… 앗! 맞췄다. 이레이나도 끝났어.

LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_2.english: The left card and the right card. Which one is it?
LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_2.korean: 왼쪽 카드와 오른쪽 카드. 어느 쪽이야?

LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_20.english: - Wait, Elena is finished too? Then the last one left is…?
LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_20.korean: - 잠깐, 이레이나도 끝났다고? 그럼 마지막으로 남은 건…?

LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_21.english: Human! I did it! I'm the last one left!

LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_22.english: Uh, then my team and yours won, right?
LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_22.korean: 그, 그럼 저랑 인간님 팀이 이긴 거죠?

LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_24.english: - Well, it was fun, so I guess that's enough...

LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_26.english: I didn't know it would be a game where you lose if the Joker is the last one left...
LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_26.korean: 조커가 마지막으로 남으면 지는 게임일 줄은 몰랐어요…

LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_28.english: Doesn't that mean you would have lost anyway...?
LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_28.korean: 그 말씀은 어차피 졌을 거라는 의미 아닌가요…?

LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_29.english: Ugh... It's okay... After all, I just happened to pass by and spotted you, so I said hello out of excitement, but I'm just Extra 1 who got dragged into this game before I knew it...
LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_29.korean: 우으… 괜찮아요… 어차피 저는 우연히 지나가다 인간님을 발견하고 반가워서 인사를 했을 뿐인데, 어느새 게임에 말려든 엑스트라1이니까요…

LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_3.english: - Finally, the moment of choice arrived.

LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_32.english: Hahaha, another showdown with the Demon King is a victory for Elena & Epsilon's team!
LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_32.korean: 후후후, 마왕 오빠와 또 한 번의 승부도 이레이나 & 엡실론 언니 팀의 승리!

LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_33.english: Challenging me and Epsilon at the same time? You're way too early!
LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_33.korean: 나와 엡실론 언니에게 동시에 도전하다니 한참 일러!

LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_34.english: It wasn't as boring as I thought, so it was fun.

LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_35.english: I can't read Epsilon's mind because her expression never changes.
LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_35.korean: 엡실론 언니는 표정이 전혀 안 변하니까 생각을 읽을 수가 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_36.english: If we weren't on the same team, she might have been a formidable opponent...

LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_37.english: Hahaha, a poker face is essential in games.

LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_6.english: - Wait, wait. You'll think I'm acting like I'm going to pick the right one, but actually I'm going to pick the left one.

LastCorruptedRecord1-6ED_60.english: Huh? Not at all? On the contrary, I think that's what a real gamer is.
