LastCorruptedRecord1-7OP_2.korean: - 처음 보는 곳인데… 도시 같기도 하고.

LastCorruptedRecord1-7OP_20.english: don't know where this is... and the buildings are all old, so it looks like they've been abandoned for quite a long time.
LastCorruptedRecord1-7OP_20.korean: 여기가 어딘지도 모르겠고… 건물들은 다 낡아서, 꽤 오래 방치된 것 같아요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-7OP_21.english: If what you said is true, Human, then I suppose I could meet 'people' inside this virtual reality.
LastCorruptedRecord1-7OP_21.korean: 인간님 말대로라면, 이 가상현실 안에서 ‘사람들’을 만날 수도 있겠죠.

LastCorruptedRecord1-7OP_22.english: Still… maybe it’s better to just wait here quietly until the human comes looking for me…
LastCorruptedRecord1-7OP_22.korean: 그래도… 인간님이 절 찾아주실 때까지는 여기서 가만히 기다리는 게 나을지도…

LastCorruptedRecord1-7OP_25.english: I didn't follow you to do that, did I?
LastCorruptedRecord1-7OP_25.korean: 그렇게 하려고 인간님을 따라온 게 아니잖아요?

LastCorruptedRecord1-7OP_26.english: Even if you aren't by my side... I have to find something I can do to be of help!
LastCorruptedRecord1-7OP_26.korean: 인간님이 옆에 안 계셔도… 도움이 될 수 있는 일을 찾아야죠!

LastCorruptedRecord1-7OP_3.english: - Is this also inside the 'blank', just in a different location?

LastCorruptedRecord1-7OP_30.english: Human, you said that here in virtual reality, Iron Bug are called 'Soul Junk'.
LastCorruptedRecord1-7OP_30.korean: 인간님 말로는, 여기 가상현실에서 철충을 ‘소울정크’라 부른다고 했죠.

LastCorruptedRecord1-7OP_31.english: Ugh... I guess I have no choice but to do it...?

LastCorruptedRecord1-7OP_35.english: In the name of the Queen of Hell… I will personally send you to hell!
LastCorruptedRecord1-7OP_35.korean: 지옥 여왕의 이름으로… 내가 직접 너희를 지옥으로 보내주겠느니라!

LastCorruptedRecord1-7OP_36.english: Hela, are you okay? I was about to look around...

LastCorruptedRecord1-7OP_4.english: - In that case, there must be people dragged here as well, and there is a possibility of encountering Soul Junk.
LastCorruptedRecord1-7OP_4.korean: - 그렇다면 이곳에도 끌려온 사람들이 있을 테고, 소울정크와 마주칠 가능성도 있겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord1-7OP_5.english: - First, let's aim to take Hela and investigate the surroundings.
LastCorruptedRecord1-7OP_5.korean: - 우선 헬라를 데리고 주변을 조사하는 걸 목표로 하자.

LastCorruptedRecord1-7OP_6.english: - There was no answer, so I looked around, but Hela was nowhere to be seen.
LastCorruptedRecord1-7OP_6.korean: - 대답이 없어 주변을 둘러봤지만, 헬라는 어디에도 보이지 않았다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-7OP_7.english: - What happened? They definitely came in together.
LastCorruptedRecord1-7OP_7.korean: - 어떻게 된 거지? 분명 같이 들어왔을 텐데?

LastCorruptedRecord1-7OP_8.english: - Did the connection fail? Or… could it be that I landed in a different place?
LastCorruptedRecord1-7OP_8.korean: - 접속에 실패했나? 아니면… 설마 다른 장소에 떨어진 건가?

LastCorruptedRecord1-7OP_9.english: - … Should I return to reality for now and figure out the situation?

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_11.english: I… I am Desire Walker… I encountered and was attacked while searching…
LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_11.korean: 데… 데자이어 워커입니다…&n수색 도중에 만나 공격당했습니다…

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_12.english: Do you not remember any characteristics of the Desire Walker that attacked?
LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_12.korean: 공격한 데자이어 워커의 특징은 뭔가 기억나는 게 없습니까?

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_13.english: It is a white-haired girl wearing purple clothes… She was leading the Soul Junk…
LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_13.korean: 보라색 옷을 입은 백발의 여자아이입니다… 소울정크들을 이끌고 있었어요…

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_14.english: That child... it must be Stella Unibell. She's been so well-behaved until now, so why is she suddenly... people
LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_14.korean: 그 아이라면… 스텔라 유니벨이군요. 지금까지 얌전했는데 왜 갑자기 사람들을…

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_15.english: Well, it’s only natural that Desire Walkers attack people.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_15.korean: 뭐, 데자이어 워커가 사람을 공격하는 것은 당연한 일이죠.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_17.english: just got back too, Mr. Nev.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_17.korean: 저도 지금 막 돌아왔습니다 네브 씨.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_18.english: So this is the person? The newcomer to our camp. Nice to meet you. My name is Kent. I am Mr. Nev's colleague.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_18.korean: 이 사람이군요? 저희 캠프에 새로 들어왔다는 인물이.&n반갑습니다~ 저는 켄트라고 합니다. 네브 씨의 동료입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_19.english: Haha, the greeting is fine. It doesn't seem like there is even time for that right now.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_19.korean: 하하, 인사는 괜찮습니다.&n지금은 그럴 시간도 없는 것 같으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_2.english: If you need more details, it would be faster to look at the materials my colleague left behind.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_2.korean: 더 자세한 게 필요하시다면, 제 동료가 남겨둔 자료를 보시는 게 빠를 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_20.english: Kent, that child has never attacked anyone first.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_20.korean: 켄트, 그 아이는 지금까지 먼저 사람을 공격한 적은 없었어.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_21.english: Mr. Nev! Your opponent is a Desire Walker! If it's your heart, it can change at any time!
LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_21.korean: 네브 씨! 상대는 데자이어 워커입니다! 마음이라면 언제든지 변해요!

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_22.english: Furthermore, the fact that they have appeared in this vicinity means it wouldn't be surprising at all if they attacked again at any time.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_22.korean: 게다가 이 근방에 나타났다는 건, 언제 다시 공격해와도 전혀 이상하지 않습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_23.english: Come to think of it, the person we were looking for was near where the Desire Walker was.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_23.korean: 그러고 보니 그 데자이어 워커가 있던 장소 근처에서 저희가 찾던 사람이 있었습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_24.english: - If it’s the person you were looking for…

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_25.english: Yes, at least the appearance matched the description I had heard.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_25.korean: 네, 적어도 들었던 인상착의와 외견이 일치했습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_26.english: - Was Hellado also in virtual reality?
LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_26.korean: - 헬라도 역시 가상 현실에 들어와 있었던 건가.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_27.english: In that case, this is certainly not the time to be doing this.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_27.korean: 그렇다면 더더욱 이러고 있을 때가 아니군요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_28.english: They might be holding that person hostage to avoid conflict with us.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_28.korean: 어쩌면 그 사람을 인질로 잡고 있는 걸지도 모릅니다.&n저희와의 마찰을 피하기 위해서 말이죠.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_30.english: Desire Walker is our enemy. Don't you think so, Mr. Nev?
LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_30.korean: 데자이어 워커는 저희의 적입니다.&n네브 씨도 그렇게 생각하지 않습니까?

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_32.english: I will say it once again: Desire Walker is our enemy who kills innocent people.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_32.korean: 다시 한번 말하지만 데자이어 워커는 무고한 사람들을 살해하는 저희의 적입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_33.english: How long are you going to keep hesitating? You are the leader here. Your sense of justice must not waver!
LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_33.korean: 언제까지 그렇게 망설일 겁니까? 당신은 이곳의 리더잖아요.&n자신의 정의가 흔들리면 안 됩니다!

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_35.english: I get it. I don't know what the Desire Walker's intentions are in holding humans captive, but... it would be best for us to protect them.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_35.korean: 알겠어. 데자이어 워커가 무슨 의도로 인간을 붙잡고 있는지는 모르겠지만…&n우리 쪽에서 보호하는 게 최선이겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_36.english: It seems to be decided! In that case, I will get ready to go right away!
LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_36.korean: 결정된 것 같군요!&n그렇다면 저도 곧바로 갈 준비를 하겠습니다!

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_37.english: - Stella... Just from the name, she sounds like an ordinary girl like Haru...
LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_37.korean: - 스텔라... 이름만 듣기로는 하루처럼 평범한 여자아이 같은데…

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_38.english: - If a bad ending exists for that child too, just like when Haru went berserk… Hela is in danger.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_38.korean: - 만약 그 아이에게도, 하루가 폭주했을 때와 같이 베드 엔딩이 존재한다면… 헬라가 위험해.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_4.english: You're saying you were called Commander before you came here?

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_40.english: … It seems it won't do any good to try and stop it.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_41.english: Understood. Then, I look forward to working with you.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_43.english: This is enough. It was a great help.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_43.korean: 이 정도면 충분해. 많은 도움이 됐어.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_48.english: I can't just sit still when I know it's obviously dangerous.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_48.korean: 위험하다는 걸 뻔히 알면서도 가만히 있을 순 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_5.english: I might be rude to say this, but honestly, I am relieved that someone like you has come.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_5.korean: 이런 말씀을 드리면 실례일지 모르겠지만, 당신 같은 분이 와주셔서 솔직히 안심입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_6.english: Well then, I probably won't disturb your rest, so I'll be going now...
LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_6.korean: 그럼 쉬는데 방해될 테니 저는 이만…

LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_9.english: The personnel who went out to search for the missing have returned… with serious injuries!
LastCorruptedRecord1-8ED_9.korean: 실종자 수색에 나갔던 인원들이 돌아왔습니다… 큰 부상을 입은 채로요!

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_10.english: I am a Soulworker leading this 'Grass Blanket Camp'.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_100.english: If all you want to do is play and laugh... I won't care at all whether that child is a human or a monster.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_100.korean: 네가 하고 싶은 일이 그저 놀고, 웃는 거라면... 저 아이가 사람이든 괴물이든 나는 전혀 신경 쓰지 않을 테니까.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_102.english: Is it really okay to be with a human...? Is it okay to eat together...? Is it okay to play?
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_102.korean: 정말 인간과 같이 있어도 돼…?&n같이 밥 먹어도 돼…? 놀아도 돼?

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_103.english: Of course. Now, tell me with all your might what you really want to do.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_103.korean: 물론이다.&n자, 네가 정말로 하고 싶은 일이 뭔지 힘차게 말해보려무나.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_104.english: I want to keep playing with Hela tomorrow and the day after tomorrow!
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_104.korean: 내일도 모레도 계속 헬라 언니랑 같이 놀고 싶어!

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_105.english: Look, old man! I even got a gift like this! My friend gave it to me!
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_105.korean: 영감님도 봐봐! 나 이렇게 선물도 받았어!&n내 친구가 준거야!

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_106.english: I… I’ve never received anything like this before! I’m so happy… I don’t know what to do!
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_106.korean: 나… 이런 거 처음 받아봐!&n너무 기뻐서... 어떻게 해야 할지 모르겠어!

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_107.english: I see. Humans are repulsive, but friends are precious. Cherish both that child and the gift they gave you.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_107.korean: 그렇구나. 인간은 혐오스럽지만 친구는 소중한 법이지.&n그 아이도 그 아이가 준 선물도 모두 소중히 하거라.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_11.english: My colleague named it that, meaning to use the grass like a blanket... but you don't need to worry too much about it. There isn't actually that much grass anyway.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_11.korean: 잔디를 이불처럼 삼는다는 의미로 제 동료가 지은 이름입니다만… 크게 신경 쓰지 않으셔도 됩니다.&n실제로 그렇게 잔디가 많지도 않으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_112.english: Hey, is this really the right place?

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_113.english: I'm telling you, I definitely saw it! A black-haired child going in here.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_113.korean: 분명히 봤다니까? 검은 머리의 아이가 이곳에 들어가는 걸.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_114.english: The description was almost identical to what was given, so it must be the missing person Mr. Tenebris asked about.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_114.korean: 인상착의도 전달 받은 내용이랑 거의 같았고 분명 테네브리스 씨가 부탁한 실종자가 맞을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_115.english: But here… there are rumors that Soul Junk, who commands spirits, appears.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_115.korean: 하지만 여긴… 혼령을 부리는 소울정크가 나타난다는 소문이 있잖아.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_116.english: That's just a 'rumor,' after all. Nobody knows until they see it for themselves.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_116.korean: 그건 어디까지나 ‘소문’이잖아.&n직접 보기 전까진 아무도 몰라.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_118.english: … Go back while I'm being nice.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_119.english: …?! It really came out! It's Soul Junk!

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_12.english: I am ashamed to admit that this is such a shabby camp.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_120.english: Oh my god, I can't believe it actually exists!

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_121.english: Soul Junk... I guess to them, I just look like the same monster.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_121.korean: 소울정크라… 놈들의 눈엔 똑같은 괴물로 보이는 거겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_122.english: I'll take care of those guys, Stella.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_123.english: Yeah… but don’t kill her. Got it?

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_124.english: I know. I'll just hurt you and send you back.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_125.english: It looks like you didn't hear the instruction to leave.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_126.english: This is your final warning. Shut your mouth and go back. I do not want to see bloodshed on such a fine day.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_126.korean: 마지막 경고다. 조용히 입다물고 돌아가라. 이 좋은 날에 피를 보고 싶진 않다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_128.english: Is this also the power of Desire Energy…

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_132.english: No, this is an excellent camp!

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_133.english: You said Soulworker, what does that mean?

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_134.english: Is it different from Desire Walker?

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_135.english: I heard it from someone I met before coming here.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_135.korean: 이곳에 오기 전에 만난 사람에게 들었어.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_136.english: An evil being, a disaster... that is how I described it.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_136.korean: 사악한 존재, 재앙... 그런 식으로 설명했지.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_137.english: Do you also think Desire is an evil being?

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_139.english: Okay, I was just about to exchange information too.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_139.korean: 좋아, 나도 정보 교류를 하고 싶던 참이야.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_14.english: You might not know since you haven't been here long.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_14.korean: 당신은 이곳에 들어온 지 얼마 지나지 않아 모를 수도 있겠군요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_15.english: Not everyone who enters here is like that, but some gain special powers like you.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_15.korean: 이곳에 들어온 모두가 그런 건 아니지만, 일부는 당신처럼 특수한 힘을 얻습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_16.english: We call them people with supernatural abilities.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_17.english: Among them, those with particularly powerful abilities are called 'Soulworkers'.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_17.korean: 그중에서도 특히 강력한 힘을 지닌 자들을, '소울워커'라 부르고 있습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_18.english: ...How do you know that when you don't know Soulworker?
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_18.korean: ...소울워커를 모르는 당신이 그걸 어떻게 알고 있는 거죠?

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_19.english: Evil beings… disasters… certainly, there are many who think that way.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_19.korean: 사악한 존재… 재앙…&n확실히, 그렇게 생각하는 이들이 많습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_2.english: It is truly a relief that I have remained safe until now in this place swarming with Soul Junk.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_2.korean: 소울정크가 들끓는 이곳에서 지금껏 무사했던 건… 정말 다행이군요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_20.english: Desire is desire, craving. It is sacrificing everything around you to achieve something.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_20.korean: 데자이어는 욕망, 갈구하는 것.&n자신이 무언가를 이루기 위해 주변의 모든 것을 희생하는 것.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_21.english: Soul is hope, what one wishes to achieve. It is sacrificing everything one has to accomplish something.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_21.korean: 소울은 희망, 이루고자 하는 것.&n자신이 무언가를 이루기 위해 자신의 모든 것을 희생하는 것.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_22.english: An acquaintance of mine defined it this way. I also agree to some extent.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_22.korean: 제 지인은 이렇게 정의했습니다.&n저 역시 어느 정도 공감합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_24.english: However, even if it is difficult, I believe that even if it is Desire, changing one's mind is not impossible.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_24.korean: 하지만 데자이어라도 마음을 고쳐먹고, 마음을 바꾸는 건 어렵더라도 불가능한 일은 아니라고 생각합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_25.english: - In fact, Haru showed a completely different side compared to the beginning. Ultimately, I suppose the influence of the surroundings is important.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_25.korean: - 실제로 하루는 처음과는 완전히 다른 모습을 보여주었다. 결국 주변의 영향이 중요한 거겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_26.english: This has gotten a bit long. It isn't exactly a pleasant topic, so let's wrap it up here.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_26.korean: 이야기가 길어졌군요.&n기분 좋게 할 수 있는 주제도 아니니, 이쯤에서 마치죠.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_27.english: Let's talk about something else this time. There are a few things I would like to ask you.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_27.korean: 이번엔 다른 얘기를 해보죠.&n당신에게는 묻고 싶은 게 몇 가지 있습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_28.english: - ended up at a new camp with people by chance... For now, let's gather as much information as possible.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_28.korean: - 어쩌다 보니 사람들이 있는 새로운 캠프까지 오게 됐는데… 일단 얻을 수 있는 정보는 최대한 얻어두자.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_29.english: - I hope nothing bad happens to Hela...

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_3.english: Even for someone with special abilities, it is a difficult environment to survive alone.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_3.korean: 이능력자라 해도, 혼자서는 살아남기 힘든 환경이니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_30.english: Wow… there are a lot of fascinating things here.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_30.korean: 와아… 여기에 신기한 것들이 많이 있어요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_33.english: That looks like an electric rocking horse commonly seen in shopping districts.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_35.english: It's a simple machine. They released it as a substitute after humans lost their riding skills.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_35.korean: 단순한 기계란다. 인간 놈들이 승마 기술을 잃게 된 뒤에 대용품으로 내놓았지.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_37.english: It's not making a hee-hee sound...?

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_38.english: It is not moving right now because it has lost power.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_38.korean: 지금은 동력을 잃은 상태라서 움직이지 않아요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_39.english: [c][00FF00][Please put money in the hole below.][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_4.english: We have already launched a search for the colleague you mentioned. We will find them soon.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_4.korean: 당신이 말한 동료는 이미 우리 쪽에서 수색에 나섰습니다. 곧 찾게 될 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_40.english: You're not just a mouthpiece—you're a lapdog of capitalism.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_41.english: I don't know what that means... how do I make it move?
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_41.korean: 무슨 소리인지 모르겠는데… 어떻게 하면 움직이는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_42.english: It seems like it won't be able to move right now, no matter what. This thing is not alive; it is merely a substitute.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_42.korean: 지금은 어떻게 해도 움직일 수 없을 것 같구나.&n이 녀석은 살아있는 것이 아닌 단순한 대용품이다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_43.english: Do you want to try riding a horse?

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_44.english: Yeah, I want to try riding it.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_45.english: Stella, if you say so, I will think about it, but...
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_45.korean: 스텔라 네가 그렇게 말한다면 생각은 해보겠지만…

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_46.english: It's okay. I think I can handle this.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_46.korean: 괜찮아요. 이 정도라면 제가 어떻게 해볼 수 있을 것 같아요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_47.english: Stella, would you like to come over here and ride with me?
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_47.korean: 스텔라, 이쪽으로 와서 저랑 같이 올라타보겠어요?

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_49.english: Yes, it will definitely move if we ride together.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_49.korean: 네, 분명 같이 타면 움직일 거에요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_5.english: I understand your concern. However, since you likely haven't been able to rest enough until now, you probably need some rest right now.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_5.korean: 걱정되는 건 이해합니다.&n그래도 지금까지 충분히 쉬지 못하셨을 테니 지금은 휴식이 필요할 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_52.english: Wow… wow! It's moving! It's suddenly moving a lot!
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_52.korean: 와… 와! 움직인다! 갑자기 엄청 움직인다!

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_53.english: Hold on tight so you don't fall! Stella!
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_53.korean: 떨어지지 않게 제 몸 꽉 잡아요! 스텔라!

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_54.english: Ah, yeah! Ahaha, I think it's going to drop really hard!
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_54.korean: 아, 응! 아하하 엄청 떨어질 것 같아!

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_55.english: Don't worry! If I don't get eliminated, Stella won't get eliminated either!
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_55.korean: 걱정 마세요! 제가 안 떨어지면 스텔라도 안 떨어져요!

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_56.english: You're a child who wields the mysterious power to move machines...
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_56.korean: 기계를 움직이게 하는 신기한 힘을 다루는 아이로군…

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_57.english: Comrades, do not be sad. If our child can smile, isn't that enough?
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_57.korean: 전우들이여, 아쉬워하지 말게.&n우리 아이가 웃을 수 있다면, 그걸로 족하지 않겠는가?

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_58.english: This place is… like a toy store. There are tons of robots.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_58.korean: 여기는… 장난감 가게 같아요. 로봇이 잔뜩 있어요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_6.english: … You arrived before I knew it.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_62.english: On top of that, everything is broken little by little...

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_64.english: By doing this with the robot wreckage here…
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_64.korean: 여기 있는 로봇의 잔해를 이렇게 해서…

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_66.english: If you press this part here like this… ! Light comes out!
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_66.korean: 여기서 이렇게 이 부분을 누르면…! 빛이 나와요!

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_67.english: Oh! It really sparkles! It's super cool! What's this kid's name?
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_67.korean: 오오! 진짜로 반짝인다! 엄청 멋있어! 이 아이는 이름이 뭐야?

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_68.english: Huh? Uh... ah... since this robot's original name is Burning Red...
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_68.korean: 네? 어… 아... 이 로봇의 원래 이름이 버닝 레드니까…

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_71.english: Does Stella want a robot like this?

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_72.english: Hmm... but there are no kids like that near me...
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_72.korean: 우음… 하지만 내 근처엔 이런 아이는 없어…

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_73.english: It's, it's okay! Burning Black is saying here that he wants to be friends with Stella!
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_73.korean: 괜, 괜찮아요! 여기 버닝 블랙이 스텔라와 친구가 되고 싶다고 말하고 있어요!

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_75.english: It might look a little… scary on the outside, but it shines so brightly… it’s cool… and… the strong Burning Black will always protect Stella! So please accept it!
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_75.korean: 외견은 조금… 무서울 지도 모르지만 이렇게 반짝반짝 빛나고… 멋지고… 그리고… 강한 버닝 블랙이 언제나 스텔라를 지켜줄 거에요! 그러니까 받아주세요!

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_76.english: … Are you giving this to me?

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_78.english: Are you okay? You're Hela's friend...

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_79.english: I already have plenty of friends, so it's okay even without Burning Black!
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_79.korean: 저한테는 이미 친구들이 많이 있으니까요.&n그러니까 버닝 블랙이 없어도 괜찮아요!

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_8.english: Come to think of it, I haven't introduced myself yet.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_8.korean: 그러고보니 아직 제 소개를 드리지 않았군요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_80.english: By any chance… do you not want to be friends with Burning Black…?
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_80.korean: 혹시… 버닝 블랙이랑 친구 하기 싫나요…?

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_81.english: No! I want to! But it's my first time making a friend, so I'm not sure how to do it…
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_81.korean: 아니! 하고 싶어! 하지만 친구는 처음 만들어 봐서 어떻게 해야 할지 잘 모르겠어…

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_82.english: It's not difficult! Just being together is enough! Because friends are fun just by being together!
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_82.korean: 어렵지 않아요! 항상 함께 있는 걸로 충분해요!&n친구는 원래 함께 있는 것만으로 즐거우니까요!

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_83.english: I see… Yeah! Thanks, Hela! Nice to meet you, Burning Black!
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_83.korean: 그렇구나… 응! 고마워 헬라 언니! 잘 부탁해 버닝 블랙!

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_84.english: Hehehe… We’re not two anymore, there are three of us like this!
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_84.korean: 에헤헤… 이제 둘이 아니고 이렇게 모두 셋이에요!

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_88.english: only intended to look around for a moment, but I ended up wandering around a lot and had a great time.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_88.korean: 잠깐, 주변을 둘러볼 생각이었는데 잔뜩 돌아다녀서 즐거웠어요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_92.english: What are you doing, old man? Let's go back quickly!

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_93.english: Stella. You seem to be having a lot of fun. Living with humans is okay sometimes, right?
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_93.korean: 스텔라. 굉장히 즐거운 것 같구나.&n인간과의 생활도 가끔은 괜찮은 거겠지?

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_96.english: Both you and I hate humans... we don't even want to look at them... but right now, I'm happy. It's... because it's a strange feeling...
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_96.korean: 영감님도 나도 인간을 싫어하는데… 인간은 보기도 싫은데…&n지금은 즐거워. 그게… 이상한 기분이라서…

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_97.english: So I'm sorry for acting weird...

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_98.english: I see... So, even while playing with that kid, she was still paying attention to me.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_98.korean: 그렇구나… 저 아이하고 놀면서도 계속 날 신경 써줬던 건가.

LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_99.english: In that case, I will say it firmly. Stella… you absolutely did not do anything wrong.
LastCorruptedRecord1-8OP_99.korean: 그렇다면 단호히 말하마.&n스텔라… 넌 절대 나쁜 짓을 하지 않았단다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_1.english: Oh... it really feels like a ghost might pop out.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_1.korean: 오오… 정말 귀신이라도 튀어나올 것 같은 분위기네요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_10.english: If it is a Desire Worker that avoids people, it would actually be a better environment. At the very least, humans won't approach.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_10.korean: 사람을 피하는 데자이어 워커라면 오히려 더 좋은 환경일 거야.&n최소한 인간은 접근하지 않을 테니까.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_100.english: Mr. Nev! I'll chase those two!
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_100.korean: 네브 씨! 저 둘은 제가 쫓겠습니다!

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_101.english: Are you sure it'll be okay? The other person is…

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_102.english: Desire Walker's full power must be this spirit right before our eyes!
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_102.korean: 데자이어 워커의 전력은 저희 눈앞에 있는 이 혼령일 겁니다!

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_103.english: If Mr. Nev and the Commander can just hold onto this spirit, we might not be able to win, but we might be able to save the girl!
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_103.korean: 이 혼령만 네브 씨와 사령관 씨가 붙잡아 주신다면, 이기진 못해도 소녀는 구할 수 있을지도 모릅니다!

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_104.english: Okay. I'm counting on you, Kent.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_105.english: Is that okay with you, Commander?

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_106.english: Haha! Just leave it to me! I'll definitely bring them back!

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_107.english: Hmph, you thought I'd let you go willingly...

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_109.english: Please stay here quietly, Mr. Unexpected Presence.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_109.korean: 여기 조용히 계시죠, 예정 외의 존재 씨.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_11.english: … Actually, I don't know much about that child either.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_11.korean: …사실 저도 그 아이에 대해서 자세히는 모릅니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_110.english: I will not let you interfere any further.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_112.english: Your opponent is over here! Don't get distracted!

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_114.english: Haa… Haa… I-I'm fine! I can still run more…!
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_114.korean: 하아… 하아… 괜, 괜찮아요! 아직 더 달릴 수 있어요…!

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_115.english: Yeah, let's rest for a bit before we go.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_116.english: Are you okay? We're being chased right now...

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_117.english: It'll be fine since the old man is gone... He's incredibly strong!
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_117.korean: 영감님이 갔으니까 괜찮을 거야…&n영감님 엄청나게 강하거든!

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_118.english: But… if even the old man can’t stop them, humans will come to capture us. They will take Hela away from me…
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_118.korean: 하지만… 영감님도 막지 못하면, 인간들이 우릴 잡으러 올 거야.&n나한테서 헬라 언니를 빼앗아 갈 거야…

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_119.english: Because all humans are bad... they only do bad things to me...
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_119.korean: 인간들은 모두 나쁘니까… 나한테 나쁜 짓만 해…

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_12.english: All I’ve done is run into them a few times by chance while on patrol.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_12.korean: 순찰 중에 우연히 몇 번 마주친 게 전부죠.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_122.english: Ugh... um... I mean... even if the old man can't win, we have me and Burning Black...! So please don't worry...!
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_122.korean: 으… 저기… 그러니까… 영감님이 못 이겨도 저랑 버닝 블랙이 있잖아요...!&n그러니까 걱정하지 마세요…!

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_124.english: No matter what happens, I won't be separated from Stella! I won't let Stella be left alone!
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_124.korean: 무슨 일이 있어도 저는 스텔라하고 떨어지지 않을 거예요!&n스텔라를 혼자 두게 하지 않을 테니까요!

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_126.english: Yeah... since the old man told me to cherish them... I will too...! I'll protect everyone no matter what...!
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_126.korean: 응… 영감님이 소중히 하라고 했으니까…&n나도…! 어떻게 해서든 모두 지켜줄게…!

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_127.english: I'm going to run away from bad people... and play with Hela...
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_127.korean: 나쁜 인간들한테서 도망치고… 헬라 언니랑 같이 놀 거야…

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_129.english: Hmm... that puts me in a difficult position. It's a shame, but that's the end of our hide-and-seek.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_129.korean: 흐음~ 그래서는 제가 곤란한데요.&n아쉽지만, 숨바꼭질은 여기까지입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_13.english: I tried to talk to her every time, but I failed repeatedly because of the spirit she was controlling.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_13.korean: 그때마다 대화를 시도했지만, 그 아이가 다루는 혼령 때문에 번번이 실패했습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_131.english: Oops! I'm sorry, but... outsiders, please take a nap for a moment!
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_131.korean: 어이쿠! 죄송하지만…&n외부인은 잠시 잠들어 있어 주시지요!

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_134.english: Phew... I finally caught it. Running over is surprisingly tiring.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_134.korean: 후우… 이제야 잡았군요.&n뛰어오는 것도 은근히 힘드네요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_135.english: Still, well... as long as that damn spirit that went off track isn't there, taking down the rest is simple.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_135.korean: 그래도 뭐…&n예정 밖으로 벗어난 그 빌어먹을 혼령만 없으면 나머지를 잡아 누르는 건 간단하죠.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_137.english: That cannot be done. We cannot let Desire Walker, who attacked an innocent human, get away with it.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_137.korean: 그건 안 됩니다.&n무고한 인간을 공격한 데자이어 워커를 이대로 둘 순 없죠.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_138.english: No... I... don't know... about that...

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_139.english: Yes, I suppose so. It is Mr. Nev's foolish mistake. But this is enough.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_139.korean: 네, 그렇겠죠. 바보 같은 네브 씨의 헛다리니까요.&n하지만 이걸로 충분합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_14.english: And for some reason, the child seemed to... extremely hate humans.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_14.korean: 그리고 무슨 이유에서인지, 그 아이는 인간을… 극도로 싫어하는 듯했습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_140.english: From now on, you… might really become a Desire Worker.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_140.korean: 지금부터 당신은… 정말로 데자이어 워커가 될지도 모르니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_141.english: Huh? What you're holding in your hand is... a lump of scrap metal? Is it a robot? Ah, it's a children's toy.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_141.korean: 응? 손에 쥐고 있는 건… 고철 덩어리? 로봇입니까?&n아아, 애들 장난감이군요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_142.english: I never imagined you would end up living with a human like this... but I am displeased that things aren't going my way.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_142.korean: 설마 당신이 이렇게 인간과 같이 지내게 될 줄은 몰랐습니다만…&n이거, 제 뜻대로 되지 않아 불쾌하군요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_144.english: If you're going to take everything from me…! I will definitely kill you!
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_144.korean: 나한테서 다 뺏어갈 거라면…!&n널 반드시 죽일 거야!

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_145.english: Hahaha... Go ahead and give it a try. A little lady who will become a Desire Worker?
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_145.korean: 후후후… 어디 한 번 해보시죠.&n데자이어 워커가 되어 줄 작은 아가씨?

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_146.english: Since there is no need to hide it here, let me tell you…

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_149.english: Well, with my current strength, this is probably the limit.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_15.english: She didn't want anyone by her side, and always... wanted to be alone.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_15.korean: 누구도 곁에 두려 하지 않고, 늘… 홀로 있기를 원했죠.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_150.english: Considering that I didn't have the help of that spirit, I fought pretty well.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_150.korean: 그 혼령의 도움이 없는걸 생각하면 잘 싸운 편입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_152.english: Hmm? Does that scrap metal toy have any special meaning?
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_152.korean: 흠? 그 고철 장난감에 무슨 특별한 의미라도 있나요?

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_154.english: Hahaha! It's been shattered into pieces. Now it finally looks like a pile of scrap metal, doesn't it?
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_154.korean: 하하하! 이거 산산 조각이 났군요.&n이제야 좀 고철 덩어리 다운 모습이죠?

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_157.english: Why are you doing this to me?

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_159.english: I want a friend too... why are you telling me not to do anything?
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_159.korean: 나도 친구가 갖고 싶은데… 왜 아무것도 하지 말라고 하는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_160.english: Of course, since they aren't human.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_161.english: I'm not human...? If I'm not human, am I not allowed to be happy?
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_161.korean: 난 인간이 아니야…?&n인간이 아니면 행복해지면 안 돼?

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_163.english: Then I'm going to get rid of everything too…

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_164.english: Because you guys took everything! I'm going to wipe them all out too!
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_164.korean: 너희들이 모두 빼앗았으니까!&n나도 전부 없애버릴 거야!

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_166.english: If you can, give it a try.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_169.english: Hehe... That's good, very good! Just rest in peace now.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_169.korean: 후후… 좋아요 아주 좋아요!&n그저 지금은 편히 잠드시길.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_17.english: Desire Worker does not try to socialize with people and acts solely for their own desires.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_17.korean: 데자이어 워커는 사람들과 어울리려 하지 않고, 오직 자신의 욕망만을 위해 움직입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_170.english: When you open your eyes next time, there will be no one by your side.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_170.korean: 다음에 눈을 떴을 땐.&n당신 곁엔 아무도 없을 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_171.english: I look forward to seeing you become a Desire Walker and slaughter humans.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_171.korean: 데자이어 워커가 되어 인간들을 학살하는 당신의 모습을 기대하겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_173.english: Yes! It's fine! We even rescued the hostage who was being held captive like this!
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_173.korean: 네! 괜찮습니다!&n이렇게 잡혀있던 인질도 구해 왔어요!

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_174.english: Just a moment, you only lost consciousness. There are no visible injuries, so you should be fine.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_174.korean: 잠깐, 정신을 잃었을 뿐입니다.&n눈에 띄는 외상도 없으니 괜찮을 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_176.english: She abandoned the hostage and ran away. In the end, it means she was nothing more than a toy to Desire Walker.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_176.korean: 인질을 버리고 도망쳤습니다.&n결국 데자이어 워커에게는 그저 장난감에 불과했다는 거겠죠.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_177.english: Well, wouldn't all Desire Workers be like that?
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_177.korean: 뭐, 데자이어 워커라는 것들이 다 그렇지 않겠습니까?

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_178.english: How about you, Mr. Nev? Did you handle those ghosts well?
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_178.korean: 네브 씨는 어때요? 그 귀신들은 잘 처리하셨나요?

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_179.english: It was dangerous, but thanks to the Commander's orders, we were able to retreat halfway. That ghost probably can't get too far away from the Desire Walker's main body.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_179.korean: 위험했지만 사령관 씨의 지시 덕분에 중간에 물러설 수 있었어.&n그 귀신은 데자이어 워커 본체와 멀리 떨어질 수 없는 거겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_18.english: They wouldn't hesitate to attack other humans for that purpose.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_18.korean: 그걸 위해서라면 같은 인간을 공격하는 것도 서슴지 않죠.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_180.english: Haha, then I suppose the case is settled for now. After all, Desire Walker has escaped and the hostages have been rescued safely.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_180.korean: 후후, 그럼 일단 사건은 정리된 셈이군요.&n데자이어 워커도 도망쳤고, 인질도 무사히 구해냈으니 말입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_181.english: Well then, let's head back. It would be best to take the rescued child to camp first to help them settle down.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_181.korean: 자, 그럼 돌아가죠.&n구출한 아이는 우선 캠프로 데려가 안정을 취하게 하는 게 좋겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_184.english: - Is everything really settled with this...?
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_184.korean: - 정말 이걸로 전부 정리 된 건가…?

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_185.english: - It's a relief that Hela is safe, but... if things continue like this, surely... just like back then...
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_185.korean: - 헬라가 무사해서 다행이지만… 이대로 흘러간다면 분명… 그때처럼…

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_188.english: I can also command if necessary.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_189.english: Desire Walker… What kind of child is Stella Unibell?
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_189.korean: 데자이어 워커… 스텔라 유니벨은 어떤 아이야?

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_190.english: Did something bad happen in the past?
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_190.korean: 과거에 안 좋은 일이라도 있었던 걸까?

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_191.english: But… maybe it’s not because that child is a Desire Walker…
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_191.korean: 하지만… 혹시 그 아이가 데자이어 워커여서 그런 게 아니라…

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_192.english: If it attacked out of fear of something… shouldn't it be someone who needs protection?
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_192.korean: 무언가에 두려움이 있어 공격한 거라면… 보호해줘야 할 대상 아닐까?

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_193.english: Stella…? We didn’t come to take Hela away.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_193.korean: 스텔라…? 우리들은 헬라를 빼앗으러 온 게 아니야.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_194.english: Are you saying it's unreasonable? Are you saying you want to fight...?

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_195.english: Why is the child named Stella trying to protect Hela?
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_195.korean: 스텔라라는 아이는… 왜 헬라를 지키려는 걸까?

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_2.english: Well, as for Soul Junk, it's been released so much that I'm sick of it.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_2.korean: 뭐, 소울정크라면 이미 질릴 만큼 나왔지만요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_20.english: Mr. Nev! Are you still hesitating?

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_21.english: Mr. Nev is a Soulworker who makes the power of justice her own. What happens if she doubts her own justice?
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_21.korean: 네브 씨는 정의의 힘을 자신의 힘으로 삼는 소울워커예요.&n자신의 정의를 의심하면 어떻게 합니까.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_22.english: Even if that is true, the fact that the Desire Walker attacked people and took them hostage does not change.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_22.korean: 설령 그게 사실이라 해도, 그 데자이어 워커가 사람을 공격했고 인질로 삼았다는 사실은 변하지 않습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_23.english: Pull yourself together and set your course. Don't back down now that you've come this far.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_23.korean: 정신 똑바로 차리고 자신이 해야 할 일을 바로잡으세요.&n여기까지 와서 뒤로 물러서지 마시고요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_25.english: … Thank you, Kent. For a moment, I wavered. I can't even imagine what would have happened to me without you.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_25.korean: …고마워 켄트. 잠깐, 마음이 흔들렸어.&n네가 없었다면, 나도 어떻게 됐을지 상상도 안 가.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_26.english: Ah, haha! You are too kind!

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_27.english: Alright then, let's get going again! Shouldn't we rescue the hostages from Desire Walker's hands before it's too late?
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_27.korean: 자, 그럼 다시 출발해 보죠!&n더 늦기 전에 데자이어 워커 손에서 인질을 구해야 하지 않겠습니까?

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_28.english: - It seemed like you just interrupted me.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_28.korean: - 지금 내 말을 가로막은 것 같았는데.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_29.english: - Just who on earth is that Kent guy…

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_3.english: How about it, Mr. Self-proclaimed Commander? If you decide to back down right now, I won't stop you.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_3.korean: 어떤가요? 자칭 사령관 씨?&n지금이라도 물러선다면 말리지 않겠습니다만?

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_31.english: - Is that child Desire Walker, Stella Unibell? She looks like nothing but a child, like LRL or the Doctor.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_31.korean: - 저 아이가 데자이어 워커, 스텔라 유니벨? LRL이나 닥터처럼 어린아이로밖에 안 보이는데.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_32.english: It is a Desire Walker, so it is dangerous to approach it carelessly.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_34.english: If you come, I'll kill you all!

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_35.english: We have come to rescue the hostage you are holding.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_35.korean: 우리는 네가 데리고 있는 인질을 구출하러 왔다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_36.english: If you let that person go, there is no reason to fight you.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_36.korean: 그 인간을 풀어준다면 너와 싸울 이유도 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_37.english: Hela is my friend! Don't take her away!
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_37.korean: 헬라 언니는 내 친구야! 뺏어가지 마!

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_38.english: - You just said Hela... I knew you were here.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_39.english: - I can't see them. Are they in the inner room?
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_39.korean: - 모습은 보이지 않는데 안쪽 방에 있는 건가?

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_40.english: No…! If you come here, everyone will bite you!
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_40.korean: 싫어…! 여기로 오면 모두가 물어뜯어 버릴 거야!

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_41.english: It seems... they don't intend to hand this over willingly.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_41.korean: 이거… 아무래도 순순히 내놓을 생각은 아닌 것 같군요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_42.english: Mr. Nev? What should we do?
